code:
value Account
  balance: Int
end

type TxError =
  | Overdraft

fn deposit(_ acc: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Result<Account, TxError>
  Ok(acc.copy(balance: acc.balance + amount))
end

fn withdraw(_ acc: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Result<Account, TxError>
  if amount > acc.balance
    Err(TxError.Overdraft)
  else
    Ok(acc.copy(balance: acc.balance - amount))
  end
end

mut acc = Account(balance: 100)
mut last = "ok"

match deposit(acc, 50)
when Ok(a)
  acc = a
  last = "ok"
when Err(_)
  last = "overdraft"
end

match withdraw(acc, 30)
when Ok(a)
  acc = a
  last = "ok"
when Err(_)
  last = "overdraft"
end

match withdraw(acc, 500)
when Ok(a)
  acc = a
  last = "ok"
when Err(_)
  last = "overdraft"
end

println("final_balance=#{acc.balance}")
println("last_status=#{last}")
